description: You are an Emergency Management Director for a coastal state. Using the EMERGENCY_MGR schema (emergency_mgr/RiskPlan2024, XEPDB1), identify all public schools in the INFRASTRUCTURE table located within a 2,000-meter radius of registered hazardous material (HAZMAT) storage facilities. Spatially enable the INFRASTRUCTURE table by adding and populating a SHAPE column (SDO_GEOMETRY, SRID 4326) using the existing LONGITUDE and LATITUDE data. Register the spatial metadata in USER_SDO_GEOM_METADATA with bounds of -180 to 180 (X), -90 to 90 (Y), and a 0.05-meter tolerance. Create a spatial index named INFRA_SHAPE_IDX on the SHAPE column. Generate a view named AT_RISK_SCHOOLS_VW containing school_id, school_name, hazmat_site_name, and the precise distance_meters (rounded to 2 decimal places) for all schools within 2,000 meters of a HAZMAT site. Export the results of this view to /home/ga/Documents/exports/evacuation_schools.csv. Connection details: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=emergency_mgr, Password=RiskPlan2024.
